message:
fix(ci): add AR env var for ARM64 Linux cross-compilation

- Set AR_aarch64_unknown_linux_gnu for openssl-src archiver
- Add documentation comments to cross-compilation env vars
- Fixes potential build failure when vendored OpenSSL needs ar
- Part of GH#115 ARM64 Linux binary support

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -125,9 +125,13 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           sudo apt-get update
           sudo apt-get install -y gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu g++-aarch64-linux-gnu
+          # Linker for cargo
           echo "CARGO_TARGET_AARCH64_UNKNOWN_LINUX_GNU_LINKER=aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc" >> $GITHUB_ENV
+          # CC/CXX for the cc crate (used by ring, openssl-src, etc.)
           echo "CC_aarch64_unknown_linux_gnu=aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc" >> $GITHUB_ENV
           echo "CXX_aarch64_unknown_linux_gnu=aarch64-linux-gnu-g++" >> $GITHUB_ENV
+          # AR for openssl-src and other build scripts that need the archiver
+          echo "AR_aarch64_unknown_linux_gnu=aarch64-linux-gnu-ar" >> $GITHUB_ENV
 
       - name: Install musl tools (Linux musl)
         if: matrix.target == 'x86_64-unknown-linux-musl'
